commit: Initial commit from Create Next App

description.en: Initial commit of the Next.js portfolio application.
description.id: Commit awal dari aplikasi portfolio next.js.
description.cn: Next.js 站点初始提交。

description.en: Made a first commit with home, about me, skills, half done with the achievements section
description.id: Membuat commit pertama dengan halaman utama, tentang saya, skill, dan sebagian dari bagian pencapaian
description.cn: 创建了第一个提交,包括主页、关于我、技能和部分成就部分

description.en: Fix the apostrophe issue in the about me section and skill section and optimize the image in education section.
description.id: Perbaiki masalah petik di bagian tentang saya dan skill dan memperbaiki gambar di bagian pendidikan.
description.cn: 修复关于我部分和技能部分的引号问题,并优化教育部分的图像。

description.en: Fix the image optimization issue in the education section and fix the import issue in all components.
description.id: Perbaiki masalah optimasi gambar di bagian pendidikan dan perbaiki masalah impor di semua komponen.
description.cn: 修复教育部分的图像优化问题和修复所有组件的导入问题。

description.en: Fix the import issue
description.id: Perbaiki masalah impor
description.cn: 修复导入问题

description.en: Delete the unwanted file (create event.js)
description.id: Hapus file tidak diinginkan (buat event.js)
description.cn: 删除不需要的文件(create event.js)

description.en: Delete the unwanted file (the table in achievement.js)
description.id: Hapus file tidak diinginkan (tabel di achievement.js)

commit: Update Next.js/React Flight packages for RCE advisory

description.cn: 通过vercle bot修复RCE安全问题
